bezeichnung: Development of Conformal Lattice Structure in ClassCAD
lernziele:
• Understanding the possibilities of periodic lattice structures generation.
  • Configurations of multiple periodic lattice structures.
  • Implementation of algorithms and techniques for conformal lattice structures.
vorausgKenntnisse: Geometry, Visual Computing, Computer Graphics or an equivalent class. Experience in C/C++ programming language and ClassCAD interpreter programming. Knowledge in algorithm and data structures. Basic knowledge in manufacturing processes.

kurse.lernziele:
• Understanding of different categories of advanced algorithms and its application areas.
  • Understanding of data structures and algorithms for efficiently handling very large, complex or dynamic data sets or combinations thereof.
  • Ability to evaluate suitable algorithms and to apply them to typical tasks.
  • Familiar with dynamic algorithms used in robotics, artificial intelligence.Understanding of basic algorithms and data structures for 3D modeling.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Algorithms and data structures for selected practical problems.
    - Reminder on linear structures, binary search tree, heap and algorithmic complexity
    - Randomized algorithms
    - Deterministic algorithms
    - Sweep algorithms
    - Greedy algorithms
  • Design of heuristic algorithms.
    - Reminder on complexity theory, combinatorial optimization problems, problem modelling
    - Greedy heuristics
    - Local search heuristics
    - Decomposition methods
    - Randomized heuristics
    - Learning heuristics
    - Classical metaheuristics
kurse.bibliographie:
• M. de Berg, G. Cheong, M. van Kreveld, M. Overmars. Computational Geometry : Algorithms and Applications, Springer, Third Edition 2008.
  • T. H. Cormen, C. E. Leiserson, R. L. Rivest, C. Stein. Introduction to Algorithms, third edition, MIT Press, 2009.
  • P. Siarry (ed.), Metaheuristics, ISBN 978-3-319-45403-0, Springer, 2016.
  • H. H. Hoos, Th. Stützle Stochastic Local Search: Foundations and Applications, Morgan Kaufmann / Elsevier, 2004.

kurse.bezeichnung: Development of Conformal Lattice Structure in ClassCAD
kurse.lernziele:
• Understanding the possibilities of periodic lattice structures generation.
  • Configurations of multiple periodic lattice structures.
  • Implementation of algorithms and techniques for conformal lattice structures.
kurse.planinhalt:
• Methods for 3D conformity, the target and the boundaries.
  • Conformal lattice structure implementation and parameterization.
  • Evaluation of periodic homogenous and periodic conformal lattice structure modelling.

kurse.leistungsnachweis: Das Projekt wird mittels Bericht und Präsentation bewertet
